title: Analytics
description: We collect, verify and structure data so decisions are based on facts, not assumptions.

items.title: Ad campaign analytics
items.description: We check campaigns, costs, requests, creatives, audiences and points where efficiency is lost.

items.title: Marketing department analytics
items.description: We evaluate channels, leads, lead cost, conversions, reporting, processes and growth areas.

items.title: Market research
items.description: We study the market, competitors, audience, offers, prices, demand and growth opportunities.

items.title: Social media parsing
items.description: Collecting open data on communities, audiences, activity and placements.

items.title: Yandex API analytics
items.description: Receiving and processing data from Yandex services for reports and dashboards.

items.title: Yandex Metrica
items.description: Analyzing user behavior, goals, traffic sources and conversions.

items.title: Yandex Direct audit
items.description: Checking campaigns, costs, keywords, requests and ad efficiency.

items.title: VK Ads audit
items.description: Analyzing audiences, creatives, bids, requests and growth points in VK Ads.

items.title: Taxi systems analytics
items.description: We structure data on drivers, requests, trips, payouts and metrics.

items.title: Digital asset assessment
items.description: Analysis of projects, communities, channels and websites before purchase or investment.

items.title: Mass audience analysis
items.description: We assess placements, reach, audience overlaps and traffic quality for promotion.

items.title: End-to-end analytics
items.description: We connect ads, website, requests and CRM into one performance picture.

items.title: Reports and dashboards
items.description: We prepare clear reports and visual panels for regular control.
